title: cestrum baenitzii var. exstipulatum
intro: Cestrum baenitzii var. exstipulatum, also known as the yellow cestrum or night-blooming cestrum, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cestrum baenitzii var. exstipulatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, alleviate symptoms of insomnia, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other musculoskeletal disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, which can be consumed orally or used topically to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
